name: Docker-Development
postCreateCommand: apt-get update && apt-get install -y ffmpeg libwebp-dev curl bash python3 python3-pip && curl -L https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest/download/yt-dlp -o /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp && chmod a+rx /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp && curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash && curl -o- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.39.7/install.sh | bash && export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && \. "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm install node && npm i -g pm2
